queries.name: with_computed_filter
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.region AS region, s.amount AS amt WHERE amt > 200 RETURN region, amt ORDER BY region, amt

queries.name: with_aggregation_stage
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.region AS region, SUM(s.amount) AS total RETURN region, total ORDER BY region

queries.name: with_having_equivalent
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.region AS region, COUNT(*) AS cnt WHERE cnt > 1 RETURN region, cnt ORDER BY region

queries.name: with_double_aggregate
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.year AS yr, SUM(s.amount) AS yr_total WITH AVG(yr_total) AS avg_year_total RETURN avg_year_total

queries.name: with_limit_in_pipe
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.id AS id, s.amount AS amt ORDER BY amt DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN id, amt

queries.name: with_rename_and_reuse
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.amount * 2 AS doubled, s.region AS r RETURN r, doubled ORDER BY r, doubled

queries.name: with_chained_filter_and_count
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.year AS yr, s.amount AS amt WHERE yr >= 2022 WITH yr, COUNT(*) AS cnt RETURN yr, cnt ORDER BY yr

queries.name: with_max_per_region
queries.cypher: MATCH (s:Sale) WITH s.region AS region, MAX(s.amount) AS peak RETURN region, peak ORDER BY region
